name: Change version code
description: Changes the app version code, allowing installation over existing versions.

name: Disable ads
description: Removes all advertisements from the app.

name: Disable analytics
description: Disables analytics and tracking from multiple SDKs, including AppMetrica, MyTracker, Firebase, Sentry, Google Analytics, Amplitude, Mixpanel, Adjust, AppsFlyer, Facebook, MoEngage, and comScore.

name: Disable analytics
description: Disables PulseSDK analytics.

name: Disable analytics
description: Disables VK-specific analytics.

name: Disable analytics
description: Disables SoundCloud's analytics.

name: Disable background scan
description: Disables the periodic Kaspersky background device scan.

name: Disable community tab
description: Hides the News/Community tab from the bottom navigation.

name: Disable consent popup
description: Disables the OneTrust consent/cookies popup on first launch.

name: Disable force update dialog
description: Makes the 'App must update' dialog skippable.

name: Disable gaming profile
description: Removes the Game Profile section from the Mine screen, including the button and the usage statistics screen.

name: Disable Mine redesign
description: Reverts the Mine screen to the classic layout, disabling the redesigned V2/V3 interface.

name: Disable Pairip license check
description: Disables the Pairip license verification check.

name: Enable SoundCloud Go+
description: Enables all premium features, hides upsell UI and ads.

name: Skip update auth
description: Removes the login requirement when updating apps.

name: Unlock Premium
description: Unlocks all FatSecret Gold features and hides the Premium tab.

name: Unlock Premium
description: Unlocks all premium features.

name: Unlock Premium
description: Unlocks all premium features.

name: Unlock Premium
description: Unlocks all premium features.

name: Unlock Premium
description: Unlocks all Muscle Motion Strength Training Pro/Individual/Business features.

name: Unlock Premium
description: Unlocks part of Ornament Pro features.

name: Unlock Premium
description: Unlocks premium features.

name: Unlock Premium
description: Unlocks premium features and removes ads.

name: Unlock Premium
description: ROOT ONLY. Unlocks all premium features.

name: Unlock Premium
description: Unlocks all Yazio Pro features.
